subject: WM-0136 ready for review
body: Implemented read-only resident, structure and empty-tile mouse selection with Pixi feedback, localized HUD inspection state, storage restore support and web-shell E2E coverage; pnpm quality, handoff validation, taskctl validate, git diff --check and web-shell E2E pass; pnpm test --filter web-shell remains an unsupported unit-runner command with equivalent E2E pass recorded.
